page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ine.2xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids processor running at 2.7 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides dedicated, non-shared compute resources. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

The instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance type.

From a resource density perspective, the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable execution times, though the lack of hyperthreading and local storage represents a tradeoff for workloads dependent on concurrent thread execution or high-speed local disk I/O. Appropriate workloads include batch processing, web serving, and compute-intensive application servers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ine.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs across 8 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute performance without hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio. It lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for compute-bound tasks such as batch processing, web serving, and application hosting where predictable CPU execution is prioritized over large memory capacities or local disk performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ine.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for predictable compute-heavy workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ine.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring eight physical Intel Xeon cores and a balanced twelve gigabit network interface.
bullet_points: Eight dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores with single-thread execution
16.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external connectivity
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage volumes
Suitable for batch processing, web serving, and compute-bound workloads
